mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO code_chunks (id, project_id, file_path, language, chunk_type, start_line, end_line, content, summary, embedding, metadata, keywords) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.filePath}, #{item.language}, #{item.chunkType}, #{item.startLine}, #{item.endLine}, #{item.content}, #{item.summary}, #{item.embedding, typeHandler=com.analyzer.infrastructure.vectorstore.handler.VectorTypeHandler}::vector, #{item.metadata, typeHandler=com.analyzer.infrastructure.vectorstore.handler.JsonbMapTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{item.keywords, typeHandler=com.analyzer.infrastructure.vectorstore.handler.JsonbListTypeHandler}::jsonb )
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET file_path = EXCLUDED.file_path, language = EXCLUDED.language, chunk_type = EXCLUDED.chunk_type, start_line = EXCLUDED.start_line, end_line = EXCLUDED.end_line, content = EXCLUDED.content, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, keywords = EXCLUDED.keywords
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, file_path, language, chunk_type, start_line, end_line, content, summary, metadata, keywords, 1 - (embedding <=> #{queryVector}::vector) AS score FROM code_chunks WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY embedding <=> #{queryVector}::vector LIMIT #{topK}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM code_chunks WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND file_path = #{filePath}
